title: 10 best herbal tinctures for bleeding spots in mouth
description: Pot marigold tinctures helps with bleeding spots in mouth because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The tincture's flavonoids, particularly luteolin, have been shown to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of mouth ulcers and gum disease. Additionally, the tannins present in pot marigold possess antibacterial and antifungal properties, which help to combat infections that may be contributing to bleeding spots.
